variants.text: I already told you everything I know. Go see the DJ and get out of here!
Who are you? Unless you've got a recommendation from the guy behind the stick, I'm not talking to 'outsiders'.
Yo! You look like you're in a rush. If you can beat me at pong, I'll tell you what I saw the DJ drop. If not... bottoms up, loser!

options.text: Is it hot in here, or is it just the 400 people?

variants.text: Sick shots! You're better than you look. Go find that big guy over by the taps-Fat Chud. He's the only one who knows the code for the floor gate.
Unbelievable! You're a legend. Alright, I'm a man of my word. The DJ has the VIP keycard. Go show him some moves on the floor before the deadline hits!

failedGame.text: Airball! That's pathetic, man. House rules: you miss, you chug. Down it!
